title: Collaborating with clients
excerpt: I run a web agency and need to provide private information and links to each individual client. This will include things like access credentials to their website and hosting, links to a staging site during the website bu…

posts.author: markblb (Mark Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I run a web agency and need to provide private information and links to each individual client. This will include things like access credentials to their website and hosting, links to a staging site during the website build and a place to share files (such as logo ideas etc)

It would be fantastic if monday could provide a facility where my business can communicate directly with individual clients - a shareable board for example BUT, without all of the add-on and setup options currently presented with sharing with Guests. It would also need to be kept private from other “users” (option to select which users would be good) rather than viewable by all

posts.author: edan (Edan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Also run an agency and could use this feature.

+1 this

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @markblb and @edan ,

Drop in here a potential solution, since the problem is still actual.

With Interactive Gantt Timeline, you can share the Gantt with clients and collaborate directly on it (if you align project timelines and edits with a client).

No client accounts.
No registrations.
No onboarding on their side.

  • Clients leave comments and suggest timeline changes right on Gantt

    leave suggestions2045×1045 312 KB
    Whenever a new suggestion is added, you’ll receive a monday notification and see the details in the item updates.

  • PMs get notification about comments and suggestions, and can test different scenarios, and then approve the appropriate timeline.

    test versions gantt1581×993 212 KB

After approving, new timeline automatically updates the board. Clients are also automatically notified about new comments and approvals.

Live Gantt instead of endless PDFs. Align project changes faster and deliver projects on time.

You can install and test the app on your account.
